login.welcomeTitle: Samee akoon ama soo gal si aad u sii waddo safarkaaga caafimaad.

login.passwordTooShort: Furaha sirta ah waa inuu ugu yaraan ka koobnaadaa 6 xaraf.
login.invalidCredentials: Emailka ama furaha sirta ah waa khalad.
login.weakPassword: Fadlan isticmaal furaha sirta ah oo ka xoog badan.
login.networkError: Cilad ayaa jirta. Fadlan hubi internet kaaga oo isku day mar kale.

profile.title: Profile-kayga
profile.noBookings: Weli wax ballan ah maadan samayn. Safarkaaga ka bilow bogga Home.
profile.guestPrompt: Akoonnada martidu ma kaydiyaan taariikhda dalabyada ee fadlan sameyso akoon joogto ah.

success.title: Hambalyo!
success.message: Dalabkaaga waa la xaqiijiyey. Goordhaw waxaa kula soo hadli doona shaqaalaha e-Balami.

about.title: Waa maxay e-Balami?
about.description: e-Balami waa wehelkaaga rasmiga ah marka aad xaalad caafimaad usafreyso. Waxay kuu sii diyaarineysaa adeegyada aad ubaahan tahay oo dhan, islamarkaana waxay kaa ilaalinaysaa dhiig-miiratada si aad u hesho daryeel hufan oo la isku halleyn karo.. Magaca "e-Balami" micnihiisu waa "Ballan ii qabo."
about.missionDescription: Hadafkayagu waa inaan dhisno buundada kalsoonida ee isku xidha bulshadeena iyo adeegyada caafimaad ee ugu tayada fiican annagoo bixineyna daryeel dhameystiran.

values.service: Adeeg Casri ah oo Tayo leh

contact.title: Nala soo Xiriir
contact.subtitle: Diyaar ayaan unahay inaan ku caawino. Fadlan nala soo xiriir adigoo taabanaya lambarada iyo ciwaanadan hoose.
